title: [Bug]: In `WHERE` clause, `ROUND`ing a  `decimal` type parameter produces unexpected results
description: master分支版本，`ROUND` `decimal`类型的表达式出现在`WHERE`子句中产生预期之外的结果
poc:
SELECT
  ref_1.c_ydogyq1 as p0, 
  round(cast(40 as decimal), ref_1.c_ydogyq1) as p2,
  round(cast(40 as decimal), ref_1.c_ydogyq1) = 0 as p3
FROM
  t_m as ref_1
WHERE
  round(cast(40 as decimal), ref_1.c_ydogyq1) = 0
  ;

SELECT
    ->   ref_1.c_ydogyq1 as p0, 
    ->   round(cast(40 as decimal), ref_1.c_ydogyq1) as p2,
    ->   round(cast(40 as decimal), ref_1.c_ydogyq1) = 0 as p3
    -> 
    -> FROM
    ->   t_m as ref_1
    -> WHERE
    ->   round(cast(40 as decimal), ref_1.c_ydogyq1) = 0
    ->   ;

do not modify the content below-->
---
**Describe the bug**
In the master branch version, expressions of type `ROUND` and `decimal` appear in the `WHERE` clause and produce unexpected results.

**Fast Reproduce Steps(Required)**

```sql
create table t_m (
  c_ydogyq1 int ,
  c_reoxwl34 int,
  primary key(c_reoxwl34, c_ydogyq1),
  unique(c_ydogyq1)) partition by hash(c_ydogyq1) partitions 9;

with the third column 0 appear in the results.
```
mysql> SELECT
    -> ref_1.c_ydogyq1 as p0,
    -> round(cast(40 as decimal), ref_1.c_ydogyq1) as p2,
    -> round(cast(40 as decimal), ref_1.c_ydogyq1) = 0 as p3
    ->
    -> FROM
    ->t_m as ref_1
    -> WHERE
    -> round(cast(40 as decimal), ref_1.c_ydogyq1) = 0
    -> ;
create resource pool pool_test unit='4c7g', unit_num=1, zone_list=('zone1','zone2', 'zone3');

DROP TENANT mysql FORCE;
key_bug_features: ROUNDing decimal type in WHERE clause produces unexpected results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DECIMAL(10, 2), description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 10.50, 'Test 1'), (2, 20.75, 'Test 2'), (3, NULL, 'Test 3');
SELECT id, ROUND(value, 1) AS rounded_value FROM test_table WHERE ROUND(value, 1) IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test_table SET value = ROUND(value, 0) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, ROUND(COALESCE(value, 0), 1) AS rounded_value FROM test_table WHERE ROUND(COALESCE(value, 0), 1) = 0;
